## LibraryRuntime.RuntimeProducedFilling.getSerializedHistory() method

Serializes the complete editing history for persistence. Includes current state, original state, and undo/redo stacks.

**Signature:**

```typescript
getSerializedHistory(original: IProducedFilling): ISerializedEditingHistory<IProducedFilling>;
```
